query:
-- Трафик по неделям
SELECT 
  YEARWEEK(createdAt, 1) as week,
  MIN(DATE(createdAt)) as week_start,
  COUNT(*) as visits
FROM utm_visits
GROUP BY YEARWEEK(createdAt, 1)
ORDER BY week ASC;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qoidv3y2UAwFYa.059d504460e8 --database YYAoWxTvDsxnrHQtNTJgbZ --execute 
-- Трафик по неделям
SELECT 
  YEARWEEK(createdAt, 1) as week,
  MIN(DATE(createdAt)) as week_start,
  COUNT(*) as visits
FROM utm_visits
GROUP BY YEARWEEK(createdAt, 1)
ORDER BY week ASC;
